title: Japanese Sliders
description: A simple and flavorful Japanese-inspired burger recipe using juicy beef patties and crispy tempura bits.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat (180°C).
Divide the beef into 4 equal portions and shape each into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a patty about 1.5 cm thick.
Season the patties with salt and pepper on both sides.
Grill the patties for 4-5 minutes per side, or until they reach your desired level of doneness.
While the patties are cooking, toast the buns on the grill or in a toaster.
Assemble the sliders by spreading a slice of garlic on the bottom bun, followed by a cooked patty, a few slices of lettuce, and finally the top bun.
